payload.text:
Here are some things you can try:

💬 "What's the weather like?" — Ask a question
📝 "Summarize this: Long article text here..." — Summarize text
💬 "Tell me a fun fact" — Casual chat
💬 "How do I make pasta?" — Get advice

Just send a message and I'll do my best to help!

name: the Examples menu button shows the same text
